Core_Validation_Method.reason: The paper used LD proteomics plus transient expression localization in Nicotiana tabacum pollen tubes and Nicotiana benthamiana leaves.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: All three points are consistent with the Results: strong LD enrichment, LD localization in pollen tubes and partial LD localization in leaves, and interpretation as LD-associated enzyme linked to lipid remodeling rather than a single metabolite.

Omics_Data.reason: The paper gives PRIDE identifiers PXD051152 and PXD068568 for proteomic raw data.
